should_fix: Confirm current pricing on both vendor sites before publish — pricing is time-sensitive and labeled 'as observed'.
nice_to_have: Add internal links to a future NovelCrafter review (B3) and best-free-AI-writing-tools (B4) once they exist.
Optional: a concrete numeric true-cost table once real per-word credit/API rates are gathered.

notes.seo_editor: Intent match full (commercial chooser). Grounded in real SERP; differentiates via true-cost angle and decision section, which the SERP leaves open. Title ~52 chars OK; draft meta description slightly long, tightened below.
notes.copyright_risk_reviewer: Low. Brand/product names used nominatively and factually; no copied vendor copy; pricing framed as observed + verify. Affiliate disclosure present at top (FTC-compliant).

metadata.title: Sudowrite vs NovelCrafter (2026): Which Should You Pay For?
metadata.description: Independent Sudowrite vs NovelCrafter comparison — features, real pricing, a true-cost example, and a simple 'pick this if you're…' guide for fiction writers.
